title: Marketplace Manager - HomeLane - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - HomeLane - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!
